recommendations.title: Struck by Lightning
recommendations.overview: After being struck and killed by lightning, a young man recounts the way he blackmailed his fellow classmates into contributing to his literary magazine.

recommendations.title: Youth Without Youth
recommendations.overview: Professor of language and philosophy Dominic Matei is struck by lightning and  ages backwards from 70 to 40 in a week, attracting the world and the Nazis. While on the run, the professor meets a young woman who has her own experience with a lightning

recommendations.title: Mrs. Hyde
recommendations.overview: Mrs. Géquil is an eccentric teacher despised by her colleagues and students. On a stormy night, she is struck by lightning and faints. When she wakes up, she feels different. Will she now be able to keep the powerful and dangerous Mrs. Hyde contained

recommendations.title: Tall Girl 2
recommendations.overview: After Jodi Kreyman gains popularity, her miscommunications start causing rifts with those around her and now she really needs to "stand tall".

recommendations.title: Skhizein
recommendations.overview: Having been struck by a 150-ton meteorite, Henry has to adapt to living precisely ninety-one centimeters from himself.

recommendations.title: Rendel
recommendations.overview: Rendel, a masked superhero, becomes blinded by his desire for revenge against a sinister criminal organization.

recommendations.title: The White Ribbon
recommendations.overview: An aged tailor recalls his life as the schoolteacher of a small village in Northern Germany that was struck by a series of strange events in the year leading up to WWI.

recommendations.title: Like Mike
recommendations.overview: Calvin and his friends, who all live in an orphanage, find old shoes with the faded letters MJ connected to a powerline. One stormy night, they go to get the shoes when Calvin and the shoes are struck by lightning. Calvin now has unbelievable basketb

recommendations.title: The Old Guard 2
recommendations.overview: Andy and her team of immortal warriors fight with renewed purpose as they face a powerful new foe threatening their mission to protect humanity.

recommendations.title: Flora & Ulysses
recommendations.overview: When Flora rescues a squirrel she names Ulysses, she is amazed to discover he possesses unique superhero powers, which take them on an adventure of humorous complications that ultimately change Flora's life--and her outlook--forever.
